Created attachment 238006
Patch - Update to 12.50 production release

@COMMITER, please update graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.

Production release is at 12.50 version, according:
https://exiftool.org/history.html

Tested on:
- FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p2

QA tests passed.

Tested in poudriere jail, to ensure an independent testing environment, with reverse dependents build test too.
